title: Critique Response Game
genericDescription: Use critique as production input; identify which feedback serves the thesis; revise without losing authorship.
specificDescription: Present a prior thesis microgame for critique, then build a new game or major revision that directly responds to three critique points. Include a response matrix.
gradingRubric: 30 pts critique integration; 20 pts design improvement; 20 pts thesis continuity; 15 pts response matrix; 15 pts reflection.
